title: podman-py is incompatible with urllib3
body:
While updating podman-py in openSUSE, I realized that it is incompatible with urllib3 as `NetworkTestCase.test_remove` fails with:
```
[   14s] E                   urllib3.exceptions.IncompleteRead: IncompleteRead(31 bytes read, -31 more expected)
```

Are there any plans to support urllib3 version 2.x eventually?

comments.body: Hey @cevich, you did some work on updating urlib3 to 2.x and then reverting it, what was going on and any idea if we can support urlib3 2.x now?

> updating urlib3 to 2.x and then reverting it

Oh yeah, what happened was Dan merged a renovate PR that failed CI.  I opened a new one that reverted that, and put some recommended (see below) version-range restrictions in place to work around some incompatibility I read about.

> any idea if we can support urlib3 2.x now?

My memory is a bit fuzzy at this point, but I think the key was hidden in either a `urllib3` or `requests` "upgrade guide" (can't remember if it was on PyPi or github).  I want to say there was some known incompatibility during a transition period from 2.1 to 2.2, but I'm pretty fuzzy on the details.

In any case, I'm **not** an expert on this stuff, I was only (at the time) following a guide, trying to get CI working again.  We probably do need to update, I just have no clue how to do that or what's required.
